message:
feat(indexer): surface structured `blocker_codes` + `active_generation_ids` on cleanup apply gate

`LexicalCleanupApplyGate` previously communicated why a destructive
apply was refused only through the free-form `blocked_reasons:
Vec<String>`. Callers that wanted to branch on the cause — CLI UX,
operator tooling, the cleanup apply pre-flight — had to substring
match on English prose like "no reclaimable cleanup candidates"
or "provided cleanup approval fingerprint does not match dry-run
plan", which is fragile and makes message wording load-bearing.

This commit adds a parallel structured surface:

  - New `LexicalCleanupApplyBlocker` enum (snake_case serde):
      * NoReclaimableCandidates
      * OperatorApprovalRequired
      * ApprovalFingerprintMissing
      * ApprovalFingerprintMismatched
      * ActiveGenerationWork
    Ordering in the emitted `blocker_codes` vec follows the order
    the gate evaluates conditions in, so consumers get the same
    explanation ranking as the string-valued `blocked_reasons`.

  - `LexicalCleanupApplyGate.blocker_codes: Vec<LexicalCleanupApplyBlocker>`
    populated alongside each `blocked_reasons.push(...)` call so
    structured and human-readable views stay in lock-step. Tagged
    with `serde(default)` so older tooling can parse new payloads.

  - `LexicalCleanupApplyGate.active_generation_ids: Vec<String>`
    carries forward the active generation IDs that caused the
    ActiveGenerationWork blocker, so callers know *which*
    generations still need to settle without having to parse the
    comma-joined list out of the human reason string. Also
    `serde(default)`.

  - Bugfix in the fingerprint branch: Mismatched used to only push
    to `blocked_reasons` (no matching code). Now it pushes to both
    `blocked_reasons` and `blocker_codes`, keeping the two in
    sync. `NotRequested` and `Matched` remain silent in both.

Test coverage extended to:
  * assert `blocker_codes` contents for each blocker path (active
    generation still blocks, stale fingerprint, no-candidates),
  * assert `blocker_codes` and `active_generation_ids` are empty
    when apply is allowed, in both the Rust struct and the JSON
    serialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
